svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.0.4 Chrome/128.0.6613.186 Electron/32.2.5 Safari/537.36" version="26.0.4" scale="1" border="10"> <diagram name="Consistent Code Generation Venn" id="venn-diagram"> <mxGraphModel dx="627" dy="549" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="50" width="550" height="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="circle1" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#a8d0f0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;opacity=60;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry width="240" height="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="circle2" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;opacity=60;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" width="240" height="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="circle3" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b8a7d9;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;opacity=60;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="110" width="240" height="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="circle4" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2a6;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;opacity=60;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="110" width="240" height="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label1" value="Domain Knowledge" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label2" value="Good Prompts" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="30" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label3" value="Effective Documentation" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="270" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label4" value="Capable Code
Generation
Model" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="254" y="260" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="centerLabel" value="Effective Legacy Transformation" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="430" y="140" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;entryX=0.167;entryY=0.292;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;" parent="mzS1lIqosHqQfDU8TxcY-2" edge="1" target="circle4"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="430" y="165" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="160" as="targetPoint" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="430" y="180" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
